hibernate-mapping.query: select lov from com.mckesson.eig.output.model.OutputLoV lov where lov.name = 'OutputConfiguration' and lov.parentId = 0
select lov from com.mckesson.eig.output.model.OutputLoV lov where lov.name = ? and lov.parentId = ?
select lov from com.mckesson.eig.output.model.OutputLoV lov where lov.name like ? || '%' and lov.parentId = ? and lov.createdDate <= ?
select lov from com.mckesson.eig.output.model.OutputLoV lov where lov.parentId = ?
select lov from com.mckesson.eig.output.model.OutputLoV lov where lov.id = ?
select lov from com.mckesson.eig.output.model.OutputLoV lov where lov.name = ? and lov.parentId = 0

select lov.id from com.mckesson.eig.output.model.OutputLoV lov where lov.name= ? and lov.parentId = (select lov2.id from com.mckesson.eig.output.model.OutputLoV lov2 where lov2.name = ? and lov2.parentId=0)
select lov.id from com.mckesson.eig.output.model.OutputLoV lov where lov.parentId = (select lov2.id from com.mckesson.eig.output.model.OutputLoV lov2 where lov2.name = ? and lov2.parentId=0)
select lov from com.mckesson.eig.output.model.OutputLoV lov where lov.parentId = (select lov2.id from com.mckesson.eig.output.model.OutputLoV lov2 where lov2.name = ? and lov2.parentId = 0)
